question: What is Tripma?
answer: Tripma is a travel planning app that turns your ideas into fully organized itineraries — with real-time flights, local recommendations, and group trip coordination all in one place.

question: When will Tripma launch?
answer: We're putting the finishing touches on the app. Join the waitlist and you'll be among the first to get access the moment we go live.

question: Is Tripma free to use?
answer: We'll offer a free tier with core planning features. Premium features like advanced itinerary AI, group sync, and offline access will be part of a paid plan.

question: What platforms will Tripma be available on?
answer: Tripma is being built as a mobile app for both iOS and Android, with a web version to follow shortly after launch.

question: Can I plan trips with friends?
answer: Absolutely. Tripma lets you invite travel companions, sync preferences, and co-plan itineraries in real time — no more back-and-forth in group chats.

question: Will Tripma work offline?
answer: Yes. Your itineraries, maps, and booking details will be fully accessible offline so you're never stuck without your plans in a no-signal zone.
